sentence: El cielo no está claro hoy.
ipa: el ˈθjelo ˈno ɛˈhta ˈklaɾo ˈoi
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Distincion keeps c(i) as [θ] in 'cielo'; the sentence has no coda -s to aspirate (hualde2005).

sentence: Estos zapatos cuestan cuarenta euros.
ipa: ˈɛhtɔ θaˈpatɔ ˈkwɛhtan kwaˈɾenta ˈewɾɔ
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: Coda and final -s aspirate to [h] ('estoh θapatoh') while distincion holds ⟨z⟩ [θ]; tonic Ŏ>ue 'cuestan' (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: La reunión es mañana a las tres.
ipa: la reˈwnion ˈɛ maˈɲana a læ ˈtɾɛ
gloss_en: The meeting is tomorrow at three.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'mañana'; coda -s of 'las' aspirates before a consonant (hualde2005).

sentence: Mi hermano vive cerca de la plaza.
ipa: mi eˈɾmano ˈbibe ˈθeɾka de la ˈplaθa
gloss_en: My brother lives near the square.
notes: Distincion ⟨ce⟩/⟨za⟩ [θ] 'cerca','plaza'; eastern Granada-Almeria-Jaen area keeps /θ/ (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Coge las llaves y ven aquí.
ipa: ˈkoxe læ ˈʝabɛ i ˈben aˈki
gloss_en: Grab the keys and come here.
notes: Yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'llaves'; coda -s of 'las' aspirates to [h] (hualde2005).

sentence: La paella de aquel sitio estaba deliciosa.
ipa: la ˈpaeʝa de aˈkel ˈsitjo ɛˈhtaβa deliˈθjosa
gloss_en: The paella at that place was delicious.
notes: Yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'paella'; distincion ⟨ci⟩ [θ] 'deliciosa'; sandhi elision 'de aquel' (hualde2005, penny2002).

sentence: Dónde has puesto las tazas nuevas?
ipa: ˈdonde ˈæ ˈpwɛhto læ ˈtaθæ ˈnwebæ
gloss_en: Where have you put the new cups?
notes: Aspiration of coda -s throughout ('hah pwehto lah taθah'); distincion ⟨za⟩ [θ] (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Cuántas personas vienen a cenar?
ipa: ˈkuantæ peˈɾsonæ ˈbjenen a θeˈnaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Tonic Ĕ>ie 'vienen'; distincion ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cenar'; coda -s aspirates 'personas' (hualde2005).

sentence: Si yo pudiera, compraría aquella casa.
ipa: si ˈʝo puˈðjeɾa kompɾaˈɾia aˈkeʝa ˈkasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Yeismo ⟨y⟩/⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'yo','aquella'; conditional register (hualde2005, penny2002).

sentence: Ayer compré cinco kilos de cerezas.
ipa: aˈʝeɾ koˈmpɾe ˈθinko ˈkilɔ de θeˈɾeθæ
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries.
notes: Distincion ⟨c⟩/⟨z⟩ [θ] 'cinco','cerezas'; final -s of 'kiloh','cerezah' aspirates (hualde2005).

sentence: El año que viene viajaré a Sevilla.
ipa: el ˈaɲo ke ˈbjene bjaxaˈɾe a seˈbiʝa
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Seville.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'año'; yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'Sevilla'; velar ⟨j⟩ [x] retained (not aspirated in the east) (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Llámame cuando llegues a casa.
ipa: ˈʝamame ˈkwando ˈʝeɡɛ a ˈkasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: Word-initial ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'llámame','llegues' (yeismo); sandhi elision 'llegues a' (hualde2005).

sentence: Buenas tardes, cómo le va la vida?
ipa: ˈbwenæ ˈtaɾdɛ ˈkomo le ˈba la ˈbiða
gloss_en: Good afternoon, how is life treating you?
notes: Tonic Ŏ>ue 'buenas'; final -s of 'bwenah','taɾdeh' aspirates to [h] (hualde2005).

sentence: Más vale pájaro en mano que ciento volando.
ipa: ˈmæ ˈbale ˈpaxaɾo en ˈmano ke ˈθjento boˈlando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: Distincion ⟨ci⟩ [θ] with Ĕ>ie 'ciento'; final -s of 'mah' aspirates; proverb register (hualde2005, penny2002).

sentence: El perro corre por la orilla del río.
ipa: el ˈpero ˈkore poɾ la oˈɾiʝa del ˈrio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Trill/tap contrast ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'perro','corre' vs word-initial [r] 'río'; yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'orilla' (hualde2005).

sentence: El niño pequeño sueña con la montaña.
ipa: el ˈniɲo peˈkeɲo ˈsweɲa kon la moˈntaɲa
gloss_en: The small child dreams about the mountain.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'niño','pequeño','montaña'; tonic Ŏ>ue 'sueña' (hualde2005).

sentence: Buscas los libros nuevos en la mesa?
ipa: ˈbuhkæ lɔ ˈlibɾɔ ˈnwebɔ en la ˈmesa
gloss_en: Are you looking for the new books on the table?
notes: Coda -s aspiration 'buhcah loh libɾoh'; sandhi elision 'nuevos en' (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Aquella villa amarilla brilla bajo la lluvia.
ipa: aˈkeʝa ˈbiʝa amaˈɾiʝa ˈbɾiʝa ˈbaxo la ˈʝubja
gloss_en: That yellow villa shines in the rain.
notes: Dense yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'aquella','villa','amarilla','brilla','lluvia' with no lateral [ʎ] (hualde2005).

sentence: No creo que llueva sobre aquellos cerros.
ipa: ˈno ˈkɾeo ke ˈʝweba ˈsobɾe aˈkeʝɔ ˈθerɔ
gloss_en: I do not think it will rain over those hills.
notes: Yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] with Ŏ>ue 'llueva'; distincion ⟨ce⟩ [θ] and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'cerros' (hualde2005, penny2002).

sentence: Las mesas están puestas para los invitados.
ipa: læ ˈmesæ ɛˈhtan ˈpwɛhtæ paɾa lɔ inbiˈtaðɔ
gloss_en: The tables are set for the guests.
notes: Coda -s aspirates across the phrase ('lah mesah', 'pwehtah', 'loh imbitaðoh') keeping distincion elsewhere (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).
